confirmApplyDesc: If you lose the connection or don't confirm within 120s, the previous configuration will be restored automatically.
bannerDesc: If you don't confirm, the previous configuration will be restored automatically.
notManaged: This file is not managed by Nexus. To change the network configuration, select <0>{{file}}</0> in the sidebar or edit it directly over SSH.
onlyModifies: Nexus only modifies <0>{{file}}</0>. The other files are readable here but should be edited over SSH.
watchdogP1: After <0>netplan apply</0>, you have <1>120 seconds</1> to confirm. Without confirmation (e.g. network access loss), the previous configuration is restored automatically.
watchdogP2: A <0>dead-man's switch</0> also restores on agent restart if it crashes during the window.
